(Transform "AffineTransform")
(NumberOfParameters 12)
(TransformParameters 0.98 0.05 0 0 1.03 -0.04 0.06 0 0.95 -1.5 2 0.75)
(CenterOfRotationPoint 50 50 40)
(InitialTransformParametersFileName "affine.txt")
(UseBinaryFormatForTransformationParameters "false")
(HowToCombineTransforms "Add")

// Image specific
(FixedImageDimension 3)
(MovingImageDimension 3)
(FixedInternalImagePixelType "float")
(MovingInternalImagePixelType "float")
(Size 100 100 80)
(Index 0 0 0)
(Spacing 1.0000000000 1.0000000000 1.0000000000)
(Origin 0.0000000000 0.0000000000 0.0000000000)
(Direction 1.0000000000 0.0000000000 0.0000000000 0.0000000000 1.0000000000 0.0000000000 0.0000000000 0.0000000000 1.0000000000)
(UseDirectionCosines "true")

// ResampleInterpolator specific
(ResampleInterpolator "FinalBSplineInterpolator")
(FinalBSplineInterpolationOrder 3)

// Resampler specific
(Resampler "DefaultResampler")
(DefaultPixelValue 0.000000)
(ResultImageFormat "nrrd")
(ResultImagePixelType "float")
(CompressResultImage "true")
